creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Fri Dec  6 16:16:35 2013
New Revision: 335772
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/335772

Log:
  - Convert to new LIB_DEPENDS format
  - Strip shared library
  - Support STAGEDIR
  - While I'm here:
    - Remove unnecessary USE_LDCONFIG
    - Sort PLIST
  
  PR:		ports/184543
  Submitted by:	Rodrigo Osorio <rodrigo@bebik.net> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/textproc/p5-libsoldout/Makefile
  head/textproc/p5-libsoldout/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/textproc/p5-libsoldout/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/p5-libsoldout/Makefile	Fri Dec  6 16:16:09 2013	(r335771)
+++ head/textproc/p5-libsoldout/Makefile	Fri Dec  6 16:16:35 2013	(r335772)
@@ -15,13 +15,12 @@ COMMENT=	Convert Markdown text in (X)HTM
 LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
 LICENSE_COMB=	dual
 
-LIB_DEPENDS=	soldout:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/libsoldout
+LIB_DEPENDS=	libsoldout.so:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/libsoldout
 
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
-USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 
-MAN3=		libsoldout.3
+post-install:
+	@${STRIP_CMD} ${STAGEDIR}${SITE_PERL}/${PERL_ARCH}/auto/libsoldout/libsoldout.so
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/textproc/p5-libsoldout/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/p5-libsoldout/pkg-plist	Fri Dec  6 16:16:09 2013	(r335771)
+++ head/textproc/p5-libsoldout/pkg-plist	Fri Dec  6 16:16:35 2013	(r335772)
@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@
-%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/libsoldout/libsoldout.so
-%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/libsoldout/libsoldout.bs
 %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/libsoldout/.packlist
+%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/libsoldout/libsoldout.bs
+%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/libsoldout/libsoldout.so
 %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/libsoldout.pm
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/libsoldout.3.gz
 @dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/libsoldout
_______________________________________________
